The '''Bank of Aargau Security, Ltd.''' was a subsidiary of the [[Bank of Aargau/Legends|Bank of Aargau]] that managed every aspect of planetary defense on the planet [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]].

By the height of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], the Bank of Aargau Security had one of the largest private armies in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The foremost mission of the company was to uphold the [[Three Statutes of Aargau]], and while many [[Aargauun]]s believed the private army helped secure their neutrality during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the private army was a necessity influenced by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] dignitaries, who maintained many bank accounts with the Bank of Aargau, and did not want the planet to be fully subjugated.

{{Company-stub}}
